attunements.name: Sol
attunements.mana: SOL MNA → Scales damage output (up to +60% at 200)

attunements.name: Nox
attunements.mana: NOX MNA → Scales damage output (up to +60% at 200)

attunements.name: Anima
attunements.mana: ANIMA MNA → Scales healing potency (up to +60% at 200)

attunements.name: Quanta
attunements.mana: QUANTA MNA → Scales SPD / Turn Order priority

attunements.name: Umbraxis
attunements.mana: UMBRAXIS MNA → Scales Defense / Damage reduction

abilities.name: Solar Presence
abilities.desc: Passive: Every 25 Radiance reduces enemy accuracy by 10%.

abilities.name: Searing Slash
abilities.desc: Attacks single target. Generates 15 Radiance. If target has any Sol status effect — inflicts Sunblind (reduces hit chance 25% for 1 turn).

abilities.name: Bastion of Dawn
abilities.desc: Slams shield down. Taunts all enemies for 2 turns. Grants all allies a Morning Shield barrier equal to 15% of Dawnwarden's max HP.

abilities.name: Corona Aegis
abilities.desc: Creates burning aura around self. For 3 turns — whenever an enemy strikes the Dawnwarden with a physical attack, they take fire damage back and have SPD reduced by 15%.

abilities.name: Daybreak
abilities.desc: Raises shield releasing a blinding wave of pure dawn light. High Sol damage to all enemies. Forcefully dispels all positive enemy buffs. Allies fully cleansed of debuffs and healed for 25% max HP.

abilities.name: Burning Horizon
abilities.desc: Passive: Consecutive hits stack attack speed and solar damage.

abilities.name: Ray Strike
abilities.desc: Quick double-slash. Deals moderate physical + Sol damage. Builds 1 stack of Solar Charge.

abilities.name: Solar Flare Dash
abilities.desc: Steps through light to reappear instantly behind an enemy. Deals Sol damage. Pushes enemy back on turn timeline. Generates 1 stack of Solar Charge.

abilities.name: Prism Dance
abilities.desc: Unleashes a whirlwind of 5 slashes distributed randomly across the enemy team. Each strike consumes 1 stack of Solar Charge to deal bonus True Damage.

abilities.name: Helios Rush
abilities.desc: Consumes all Solar Charge stacks. Strikes primary target 6 times in rapid succession. Each critical hit extends a team-wide SPD buff (+30%) for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Dying Star
abilities.desc: Passive: Damage increases as HP decreases.

abilities.name: Density Strike
abilities.desc: Brutal overhead swing. Heavy physical damage. Generates 20 Core Heat. Pushes enemy down the turn timeline.

abilities.name: Gravity Well
abilities.desc: Slams sword into ground. Pulls all frontline enemies into a single cluster. Increases Core Heat by 15%. Inflicts Weighed Down — reduces enemy evasion to 0% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Singularity Cleave
abilities.desc: Sweeping arc attack hitting all adjacent enemies. Damage scales higher the lower the Starbreaker's current HP. Pairs with the Dying Star passive — low HP is maximum power.

abilities.name: Supernova Strike
abilities.desc: Unleashes entire stored stellar core energy in one catastrophic blow. Massive armor-piercing explosive damage to entire enemy team. Leaves a burning aura dealing Sol DoT for 3 turns. Resets Core Heat to 0%.

abilities.name: Eye of Sol
abilities.desc: Passive: Judged enemies take increased damage and cannot hide.

abilities.name: Righteous Gavel
abilities.desc: Hits single target. Applies Judgment Mark for 3 turns. Deals bonus damage if target has any negative status effects.

abilities.name: Decree of Light
abilities.desc: Emits pulse of truth. Cleanses 1 debuff from an ally. Grants that ally a Verity Shield — converts the next incoming attack into healing instead of damage. Generates 15 Verdict.

abilities.name: Smite the Guilty
abilities.desc: Slams hammer on marked enemy. Consumes the Judgment Mark. Deals massive Sol damage. Stuns target for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Final Verdict
abilities.desc: Summons a colossal spectral gavel from the heavens. High physical + Sol damage to entire enemy team. Any enemy below 25% HP is instantly executed. Surviving enemies are Silenced for 2 turns — no abilities permitted.

abilities.name: Afterimage
abilities.desc: Passive: Dashes and crits leave echoes that repeat attack damage.

abilities.name: Corona Stash
abilities.desc: Quick stab from shadows. Deals high critical damage. If it lands a critical hit — enters Solar Veil for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Umbral Shift
abilities.desc: Swaps places with an active Refraction Echo. Cleanses all tracking debuffs. Extends stealth duration.

abilities.name: Blinding Mirror
abilities.desc: Throws a flurry of reflective daggers. Moderate damage to frontline. Applies Total Eclipse to primary target — all their attacks miss for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Solar Eclipse
abilities.desc: Plunges entire battlefield into a cosmic eclipse. Eclipsedancer vanishes completely for 2 turns. Summons 3 Refraction Echoes. For 2 turns — can attack without breaking stealth. All attacks deal pure armor-piercing Sol damage.

abilities.name: Running Hot
abilities.desc: Passive: High Velocity causes shots to apply Burn effects.

abilities.name: Dual Discharge
abilities.desc: Rapid two-shot burst. Sol + Energy damage. Generates 15 Solar Charge. Increases Velocity by 5%.

abilities.name: Flare Shot
abilities.desc: High-intensity tracing round. Marks enemy with Target Illuminated — increases critical hit chance of ALL allies against that target by 20% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Bullet Time / Overcharge
abilities.desc: Spend 50 Solar Charge to immediately take another turn. During this bonus turn — all pistol attacks strike an additional random target simultaneously.

abilities.name: Bullet Time
abilities.desc: Spend Solar Charge for an immediate bonus attack turn.

abilities.name: Corona Storm
abilities.desc: Spins in place unleashing an absolute tempest of hyper-velocity photon lasers at the entire enemy party. Fires 12 shots distributed randomly across all enemies. Each shot permanently shreds 5% of the target's total armor for the rest of combat.

abilities.name: Light Finds a Way
abilities.desc: Passive: Shots gain armor penetration with distance.

abilities.name: Focused Beam
abilities.desc: Precise rifle shot dealing high piercing damage in a straight line. Hits both the primary target AND the enemy standing directly behind them.

abilities.name: Photon Lock-On
abilities.desc: Spend the turn entering sniper stance. Critical Damage +50%. Next attack cannot be blocked or parried. Generates 30 Photon Charge.

abilities.name: Tactical Flare
abilities.desc: Launches a flare capsule at an enemy position. Dispels all enemy evasion buffs. Applies Melt Armor (-30% DEF) to all targets in that row.

abilities.name: Aphelion
abilities.desc: Channels all weapon energy into a single massive orbital laser link. Fires a colossal beam of concentrated Sol energy piercing through a single target for catastrophic damage. If this kills the target — 50% of the damage overflows and hits the remaining enemy party members.

abilities.name: The Wellspring
abilities.desc: Passive: Sprout Nodes heal allies or damage enemies when triggered.

abilities.name: Solar Flare
abilities.desc: Casts a bolt of plasma at an enemy. Generates 20 Fusion Energy. If a Miniature Sun is active near the target — the sun fires a matching minor bolt simultaneously.

abilities.name: Protoplanetary Spark
abilities.desc: Summons a Miniature Sun construct with 30% of caster's HP onto an empty battlefield slot. Acts independently each turn.

abilities.name: Evolutionary Bolt
abilities.desc: High Spirit damage. Places Sprout Node on turn timeline.

abilities.name: Gravitational Pull
abilities.desc: Commands all active Miniature Suns to shift positions simultaneously — pulling adjacent enemies toward them and applying Immobilized for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Primal Growth
abilities.desc: Heal self for significant HP. Grant Thick Hide (+25% DEF) for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Starfall
abilities.desc: Forces all active Miniature Suns to collapse simultaneously into a massive cosmic chain reaction. Devastating Sol + Fire damage to all enemies. Leaves a Nebula Restorative Cloud over the ally side — heals all party members for 15% max HP every turn for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Living Reactor
abilities.desc: Passive: High Fusion Energy grants bonus damage and passive heat aura.

abilities.name: Forge-Slap
abilities.desc: Strikes enemy with heavy hard-light blade. Shifts core toward Entropy. Generates a minor shield.

abilities.name: Plasma Singularity
abilities.desc: Casts a swirling ball of Sol energy at an enemy row. Fire damage over time. Shifts core toward Fusion.

abilities.name: Forge Strike
abilities.desc: Hard-light blade strike. Generates Fusion Energy.

abilities.name: Solar Reforging
abilities.desc: Instantly resets Stellar Core to perfect center. Cleanses all debuffs from the Knight. Transforms weapon into a Sun-Spear for 2 turns — basic attacks gain 2-tile reach.

abilities.name: Heart Of The Sun
abilities.desc: Plunges blade directly into armor's power core. Blinding shockwave of hard-light blades in every direction. Heavy physical + Sol damage to all enemies bypassing all defensive barriers. Knight enters Over-Clocked Forge for 3 turns — every basic attack automatically triggers a free cast of Plasma Singularity without consuming a turn.

abilities.name: Immutable Presence
abilities.desc: Passive: Staying stationary builds Permanence stacks.

abilities.name: Chill-Bite Strike
abilities.desc: Physical + cold damage to single target. Generates 15% Contraction. Inflicts Frostbite — reduces target physical damage output by 15% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Gravity Pull
abilities.desc: Slams black shield into earth creating a vacuum. Forces Taunt on all enemies for 2 turns. Pulls frontline enemies closer, trapping them in the same row. Builds Contraction by 20%.

abilities.name: Absolute Zero Ward
abilities.desc: Forms barrier of dark matter around self. For 2 turns — any enemy that casts a spell or uses an ability targets the Bastion instead. Absorbs 30% of that damage as direct healing.

abilities.name: Penumbral Collapse
abilities.desc: Collapses shield energy inward. Heavy cold + dark damage to all enemies. Strips all SPD and Turn Meter buffs from enemy team — freezing their current turn timeline positions for 1 round. Bastion gains shield equal to 40% max HP.

abilities.name: Slow Inevitability
abilities.desc: Passive: Enemy turn losses generate bonus damage next turn.

abilities.name: Frost-Lace
abilities.desc: Lightning-fast dual-pierce. Physical + cold damage. Applies 1 stack of Glacial Resonance.

abilities.name: Singularity Step
abilities.desc: Teleports through shadow to hit a backline target directly. Pushes target back by 20% on the Turn Meter.

abilities.name: Blizzard Flurry
abilities.desc: Rapid-succession multi-strike hitting a single target 4 times. Each strike consumes 1 Glacial Resonance stack to deal bonus True Cold Damage.

abilities.name: The Great Stillness
abilities.desc: Dashes through all enemies in a fraction of a second, slashing vital pressure points with absolute zero energy. High critical damage to all targets. Any enemy currently suffering a SPD debuff is instantly frozen for 2 turns. Rimewalker gains an immediate free bonus turn.

abilities.name: Long Winter
abilities.desc: Passive: Gains damage and crit as Wintermark stacks rise.

abilities.name: Collapse Cleave
abilities.desc: Brutal downward swing. Massive physical damage. Increases Entropy Decay by 20%. Lowers Worldender's own SPD by 10% for 2 turns — stackable up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Shatter-Point
abilities.desc: Precise heavy stab aimed at enemy armor plate. Destroys 40% of target's total armor permanently. Inflicts Brittle — increases all incoming critical hit damage taken by 25%.

abilities.name: Void Compression
abilities.desc: Slashes horizontally creating a vacuum arc hitting all frontline enemies. Heavy dark damage. Prevents targets from receiving any positive status buffs for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Cosmic Crunch
abilities.desc: Drives massive blade into the heart of the battlefield — reality folds inward. Catastrophic armor-ignoring dark damage to all enemies. Instantly triggers and consumes ALL active DoT effects on the enemy team — dealing their entire remaining damage pools simultaneously.

abilities.name: Universal Constant
abilities.desc: Passive: Strongest enemy automatically gains Imbalance.

abilities.name: Leveling Blow
abilities.desc: Physical damage to single target. Applies Grounded — prevents target from dodging, teleporting, or using movement abilities for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Stillness Domain
abilities.desc: Radiates a wave of heavy dark matter. Decreases Attack Power and Critical Hit chance of ALL enemies by 20% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Stasis Lock
abilities.desc: Strikes enemy over the head. Heavy physical damage. Forces target's turn meter to freeze completely for 1.5 rounds — cannot move forward or backward on the timeline.

abilities.name: The Great Equalizer
abilities.desc: Slams hammer with absolute authority. Forces a team-wide reset — ALL active positive and negative status effects on all characters (allies and enemies) are instantly erased. Deals massive physical + dark damage to all enemies based on how many buffs were cleared from them.

abilities.name: Patient Predator
abilities.desc: Passive: Observing same target builds Precision stacks.

abilities.name: Dark-Stitch
abilities.desc: Double stab from behind. High physical + dark damage. Generates 25 Shadow Weave.

abilities.name: Fade to Black
abilities.desc: Instantly enters Umbral Stealth for 2 turns. Evasion increases 50%. Next attack from stealth is a guaranteed critical hit.

abilities.name: Void Blossom
abilities.desc: Throws a cloud of black star-glass daggers at an enemy row. Moderate physical damage. Applies Blindness and Bleeding Dark (dark DoT) to all targets hit.

abilities.name: Eclipse Execution
abilities.desc: Velestra dissolves completely into the shadows of the entire enemy team. Strikes every enemy once from their own shadow — catastrophic armor-piercing damage to all. The enemy with the lowest remaining HP takes double damage and is permanently silenced for the rest of the fight if they survive.

abilities.name: Controlled Environment
abilities.desc: Passive: More Restriction stacks = higher Cryovex crit chance.

abilities.name: Freeze-Fire Burst
abilities.desc: Fires two frozen darts. Physical + cold damage. Consumes 1 Cryo-Cartridge. Applies Chilled to target.

abilities.name: Flash-Freeze Shell
abilities.desc: Fires heavy explosive frost canister at an enemy row. AoE cold damage. Slows Turn Meter of all targets hit by 15%. Generates 2 Cryo-Cartridges.

abilities.name: Bitter Hail
abilities.desc: Unloads all remaining Cryo-Cartridges into a single target. Each bullet deals bonus damage if target is already Frozen or Chilled.

abilities.name: Cryo-Grid Bullet Hell
abilities.desc: Spins firing a grid of liquid-nitrogen lasers across the entire battlefield. High cold damage to all enemies. Locks all enemies into a Glacial Grid for 2 turns — any enemy that attempts to move, swap rows, or use a movement skill takes massive True Damage and is instantly frozen.

abilities.name: Inevitable Conclusion
abilities.desc: Passive: Finality marks generate Resolution each turn target survives.

abilities.name: Absolute Stop
abilities.desc: Heavy precise rifle shot. Massive piercing physical damage to single target. Pushes target's Turn Meter back by 25%.

abilities.name: Thermal Drain Scope
abilities.desc: Locks scope onto enemy target. Rips away 20% of target's SPD and Critical Hit chance — adding it to the Terminus's next shot. Generates 30% Zero-Point Charge.

abilities.name: Void-Piercer Round
abilities.desc: Fires high-density dark matter bullet piercing through an entire column of enemies. High dark damage. Applies Fractured Soul — targets cannot be healed by support classes for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Heat Death Vengeance
abilities.desc: Fires a single devastating absolute-zero round at the speed of darkness. Catastrophic damage to a single target. If target is below 50% HP — deals triple damage. If it kills the target — absolute-zero explosion spreads to all adjacent enemies, freezing them for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Return to Origin
abilities.desc: Passive: Enemies reaching Deviation threshold auto-Regress.

abilities.name: Void Bolt
abilities.desc: Missile of pure dark antimatter. Dark damage. If target has mana — burns 15% of their mana pool and converts it into bonus damage.

abilities.name: Primordial Silence
abilities.desc: Casts field of absolute vacuum over an enemy row. Minor cold damage. Silences all targets in that row for 1 turn — cannot use magic skills.

abilities.name: Heat Drain
abilities.desc: Siphons literal thermal energy from an enemy. High cold damage. Inflicts Hypothermia — cold DoT and reduces health recovery by 80% for 3 turns.

abilities.name: The Cosmic Reset
abilities.desc: Channels the ancient state of the pre-Big Bang universe. Opens a massive void rift swallowing the battlefield in pure darkness. Immense dark + cold damage to all enemies. Forcefully drains 50% of the entire enemy team's current resource/mana bars. Locks all enemy cooldowns from ticking down for 2 rounds.

abilities.name: Perfect Arrangement
abilities.desc: Passive: Each Lattice Mark increases spell and weapon damage.

abilities.name: Lattice Slash
abilities.desc: Ice-infused blade strike. Physical + cold damage. Generates 1 Lattice Layer.

abilities.name: Frost Spike
abilities.desc: Summons a massive jagged ice spike from beneath an enemy. High cold damage. Inflicts Brittle for 2 turns. Generates 1 Lattice Layer.

abilities.name: Shatter-Burst Shield
abilities.desc: Consumes 2 Lattice Layers to create an instant 25% max HP frost barrier around an ally or self. If an enemy breaks this shield — it explodes outward dealing heavy cold damage and blinding all frontline enemies.

abilities.name: Runic Refrigeration
abilities.desc: Drives spellblade into the ground, freezing the molecular structure of the entire battlefield lattice. Massive physical + cold damage to all enemies. Applies Structural Collapse for 3 turns — all enemies take 20% increased physical damage from all sources, and basic attacks against them splash cold damage to adjacent allies.

abilities.name: Sacrificial Ignition
abilities.desc: All special abilities cost a percentage of current HP instead of mana. The Aegis does not spend mana. They spend themselves.

abilities.name: Blazing Soul
abilities.desc: At 100 Kindling, for 2 turns: all HP costs are removed, broadsword strikes deal bonus Spirit damage, and 50% of all damage dealt returns as healing. The Aegis becomes the fire they were burning toward.

abilities.name: Solar Presence
abilities.desc: Passive: Every 25 Radiance reduces enemy accuracy by 10%.

abilities.name: Embersmith Strike
abilities.desc: Heavy flaming downward slash. Physical + fire damage to single target. Generates 15 Kindling. If target is already burning — transfers the burn to an adjacent enemy.

abilities.name: Cinder Bash
abilities.desc: Brutal shield-slam releasing compressed heat. Heavy physical damage scaling directly with current DEF stat. Applies Charred for 2 turns — reduces target attack power 25% and prevents dodging.

abilities.name: Essence Drain
abilities.desc: Precise thrust cauterizing wounds while violently extracting vital energy. Moderate Spirit damage. Heals Aegis for 150% of damage dealt. If Aegis is below 40% HP — deals double damage. The most wounded state becomes the most dangerous.

abilities.name: Martyr's Mantle
abilities.desc: Cloak a fragile ally in protective swirling soul-fire. For 2 turns that ally gains 50% damage reduction. If that ally takes damage — Aegis instantly gains 30 Kindling.

abilities.name: Spirit-Scourge Wave
abilities.desc: Massive broadsword arc sending a crescent of white spiritual energy across the enemy team. Anima AoE damage. Applies Charred to all enemies hit for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Searing Slash
abilities.desc: Physical attack. Generates 15 Radiance.

abilities.name: Beacon of the Hearth
abilities.desc: Slam shield into earth, releasing a wave of blinding spiritual heat. Taunts all enemies for 2 turns. Aegis gains a spiritual barrier equal to 25% max HP. For 2 turns, intercepts 40% of all damage directed at allies.

abilities.name: Bastion of Dawn
abilities.desc: Taunt all enemies. Grant Morning Shield barrier (15% max HP).

abilities.name: Threat To The Pack
abilities.desc: Leaps high and slams sword down, shattering the earth. Catastrophic physical damage to all enemies. Soul-Bound aura triggers — heals all allies for 30% of damage dealt. Applies Lifemark to all allies for 3 turns, marking them for amplified future healing.

abilities.name: Pulse Balance
abilities.desc: Ending a turn with the Pulse Gauge exactly centered grants a free defensive barrier for the next round. Rewards rhythmic play — neither gathering nor releasing too aggressively.

abilities.name: Systole
abilities.desc: Gauge state: skills that heal the Arbiter or drain enemy stats are empowered while the Pulse Gauge sits in the Systole zone — the contraction phase of the heartbeat rhythm.

abilities.name: Diastole
abilities.desc: Gauge state: skills that release energy outward as massive raw damage are empowered while the Pulse Gauge sits in the Diastole zone — the expansion phase of the heartbeat rhythm.

abilities.name: Uncertainty Principle
abilities.desc: Passive: Damage variance increases with distance. Max potential rises dramatically.

abilities.name: Kinetic Cadence
abilities.desc: Swift double-strike — one slash per blade. Moderate physical damage. Generates 10 Anima. If the target is suffering from any status ailment, strikes a third time automatically.

abilities.name: Resonant Riposte
abilities.desc: Enter a hyper-aware state, crossing swords to catch incoming vibrations. Grants 100% Counter-Attack chance for 1 round. When hit by a physical attack, instantly strike back for equal damage.

abilities.name: Anima Sync
abilities.desc: Drive one blade into the shadow, linking life force to an ally. For 2 turns, 30% of all damage dealt by that ally flows into the Arbiter as healing. Generates massive Anima while the link is active.

abilities.name: Echoing Flurry
abilities.desc: Move so fast the Arbiter appears in three places simultaneously. Strikes the same target three times in rapid succession, with increasing damage on each successive hit.

abilities.name: Collapse Wave
abilities.desc: Fire quantum round. Damage resolves next turn based on active debuffs.

abilities.name: Reaver's Rhythm
abilities.desc: Cruel twisting slash that siphons life force. Physical damage. Applies Arrhythmia for 3 turns, reducing target speed by 15%. Arbiter heals for 50% of damage dealt. Shifts the Pulse Gauge toward Systole.

abilities.name: Sovereign Verse
abilities.desc: Heavy dual-overhead chop releasing a shockwave of compressed purpose. Deals True Damage, ignoring armor entirely. If target is below 30% HP, deals 50% bonus damage. Shifts the Pulse Gauge toward Diastole.

abilities.name: Quantum Sight
abilities.desc: Observe all trajectories. Next 2 attacks ignore 40% armor. Crit +20%.

abilities.name: Resonance Cascade
abilities.desc: Releases all accumulated pulse energy simultaneously. Strikes all enemies in a perfect heartbeat pattern. Damage scales with current Pulse Gauge position, reaching maximum power when the gauge sits at perfect center balance between Systole and Diastole.

abilities.name: Dominance Aura
abilities.desc: Passive: Rising Dominance imposes fear penalties on all enemies.

abilities.name: Heavy Cleave
abilities.desc: Brutal downward hack. Heavy physical damage to single target. Splashes 30% damage to adjacent enemies. Generates 15 Dominance.

abilities.name: Prey Marker
abilities.desc: Marks the enemy with the highest HP as The Quarry for 3 turns. All Dominion attacks against The Quarry ignore 30% of their total armor.

abilities.name: Ravage
abilities.desc: Massive physical damage. If target is below 40% HP — deals double damage. If it kills the target — cooldown instantly resets.

abilities.name: Threat To The Pack
abilities.desc: Leaps high and slams sword down shattering the earth. Catastrophic physical damage to all enemies. Surviving enemies gain Terror for 2 turns — lose 50% of their Turn Meter and are forced to flee/pass instead of attacking. Passive: Dominance Aura — passive fear penalties scale with Dominance gauge level. "Life is an unyielding tyrant."

abilities.name: Resonant Pulse
abilities.desc: Passive: Vitality Echoes amplify healing by 20% per stack.

abilities.name: Pulse Strike
abilities.desc: Slams hammer on single target. Physical damage. Generates 1 Vitality Echo. Lowest-health ally is instantly healed for 50% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Vitalizing Swing
abilities.desc: Sweeping attack striking up to 3 frontline enemies. For each enemy hit — grants a random ally a Regrowth buff restoring 5% max HP per turn for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Font of Life
abilities.desc: Drives hammer handle into the ground, turning crystal head into a beacon. Instantly heals entire party. Cleanses 1 negative status condition from each ally.

abilities.name: The Healing Anvil
abilities.desc: Brings hammer down with monumental force, cracking battlefield open to release pure vital energy. Heavy blunt damage to all enemies. Creates a permanent Sanctuary Zone on ally side for 3 turns — allies cannot have HP dropped below 1, and receive 30% boost to all incoming healing. Passive: Resonant Pulse — echoes amplify healing output proportional to stacks consumed. "To protect life, one must sometimes break the bones of those who threaten it."

abilities.name: Parasitic Bond
abilities.desc: Passive: Heals 100% of all Infestation DoT damage.

abilities.name: Tendril Prick
abilities.desc: Double-dagger puncture. High physical damage. Applies 1 stack of Infestation.

abilities.name: Host Melding
abilities.desc: Dissolves into a dark pool of biological liquid — enters Symbiotic Stealth for 2 turns. Cannot be targeted. Next attack out of stealth transfers all negative status effects currently on the Hunter onto the target.

abilities.name: Blood Feast
abilities.desc: Savage rapid-fire tearing slash. Consumes all active Infestation stacks. Deals massive True Damage scaling with stacks consumed.

abilities.name: Biological Takeover
abilities.desc: Teleports behind target and plunges both daggers into their spine — symbiote floods entirely into target's nervous system. Catastrophic physical damage. If target dies — Hunter temporarily possesses the corpse, forcing it to attack its own allies for 1 round before collapsing into biological ash. Passive: Parasitic Bond — Hunter heals 100% of all Infestation DoT damage dealt. "Ultimate lethality requires a partnership."

abilities.name: Spore Saturation
abilities.desc: Passive: Density imposes accuracy/evasion penalties on enemies.

abilities.name: Fungal Burst
abilities.desc: Rapid two-shot burst. Nature + Anima damage. Increases Spore Cloud Density by 15%.

abilities.name: Toxin Tumble
abilities.desc: Quick acrobatic roll — dodges next incoming attack completely. While rolling drops a gas canister applying Spore Blight to entire enemy front row — minor DoT for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Pollen Screen
abilities.desc: Fires flash-capsule at an ally's feet. Creates dense cloud — instantly cleanses ally of all tracking and mark debuffs. Increases their Evasion by 40% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: GREAT SPORE APOCALYPSE
abilities.desc: Rain predatory spores on all enemies. Heal party 20% max HP.

abilities.name: The Great Spore Apocalypse
abilities.desc: Unloads both pistols into the sky raining a massive dense canopy of predatory spores across the entire map. High AoE Nature damage to all enemies. Applies Necrotic Suffocation — stuns all enemies for 1 turn and reduces attack power by 30% for 2 turns. Heals all party members for 20% max HP. Passive: Spore Saturation — passive accuracy and evasion penalties to all enemies scale with current cloud density. "Life spreads through airborne contagion."

abilities.name: Genetic Mapping
abilities.desc: Passive: At 100% Sequenced — target loses all resistances.

abilities.name: Target Sequence
abilities.desc: Precise rifle shot. High piercing physical damage. Generates 25% Sequencing data on target. If target has a shield — destroys it instantly.

abilities.name: Bio-Targeting Scope
abilities.desc: Spend the turn calibrating the rifle. Next attack's Critical Damage +60%. Inflicts Exposed DNA on target — prevents all defensive stat buffs for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Mutagen Round
abilities.desc: Highly unstable chemical round. Moderate physical + acid damage. Applies Cellular Degradation — target takes 20% increased damage from all sources for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Chromosomal Breakdown
abilities.desc: Chambers a single glowing white-hot anti-biological bullet. Catastrophic armor-ignoring damage to single target. If target has active buffs — those buffs are violently converted into explosive energy dealing heavy splash damage to all adjacent enemies and instantly dropping their Turn Meters to 0. Passive: Genetic Mapping — sequencing data builds passively each time the target acts, rewarding patience. "Every living thing has a genetic flaw written into its very DNA."

abilities.name: The Wellspring
abilities.desc: Passive: Sprout Nodes heal allies or damage enemies when triggered.

abilities.name: Evolutionary Bolt
abilities.desc: Spinning missile of pure concentrated Anima energy. High Spirit damage. Generates 1 Sprout Node on the turn timeline directly ahead of the target.

abilities.name: Primal Growth
abilities.desc: Massive burst of life energy over a targeted ally row. Instantly heals all allies in that row. Grants Thick Hide — increases total DEF by 25% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Mutation Cascade
abilities.desc: Target ally or enemy. If ally — grants a random massive offensive buff (+40% ATK, +30% SPD, or +50% Crit) for 2 turns. If enemy — mutates their body into a fragile form reducing all stats by 30% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Genesis Rebirth
abilities.desc: Channels the absolute limit of the planet's vital fire. Massive golden wave of primordial liquid across the entire field. Immense Spirit + Nature damage to all enemies. Completely revives any dead party members at 50% HP. Resets ALL ally skill cooldowns to 0. Floods the entire turn timeline with Sprout Nodes. Passive: The Wellspring — Sprout Nodes persist on the timeline until triggered, creating compounding battlefield pressure. "Life is a cosmic event that began with a spark and refuses to be snuffed out."

abilities.name: Bio-Molding
abilities.desc: Passive: Each Flesh Shard adds 6% lifesteal (max 30%).

abilities.name: Siphon Slash
abilities.desc: Quick precise thrust with blood-blade. Physical + Anima damage. Generates 1 Flesh Shard. Heals Biomancer for 30% of damage dealt.

abilities.name: Bone Spike
abilities.desc: Condenses blood from the battlefield to shoot a cluster of jagged bone spikes at an enemy row. High physical damage. Inflicts Bleeding Anima DoT on all targets hit for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Exoskeleton Hardening
abilities.desc: Consumes 2 Flesh Shards. Creates heavy calcified bone shield around self or ally. While active — any enemy that strikes this shield takes high physical pierce damage back from razor-sharp bone ridges.

abilities.name: The Sacred Harvest
abilities.desc: Drives spellblade into the heart of a bleeding enemy — all spilled vital force violently erupts outward. Massive armor-piercing physical + Spirit damage to all enemies. Every active Bleeding Anima effect on the field is instantly consumed — healing entire party for the total remaining damage pool and granting everyone a temporary 20% max HP shield. Passive: Bio-Molding — each Flesh Shard grants 6% lifesteal, stacking to 30% at maximum. "The flesh is a canvas, and the blade is the paintbrush."

abilities.name: Superposition Shield
abilities.desc: Passive: Chance to phase out when hit — damage reduced to 0.

abilities.name: Chrono-Strike
abilities.desc: Physical + Quantum damage. Generates 15% Probability. Applies Uncertain State — target has 25% chance to miss their next action.

abilities.name: Retrocausal Taunt
abilities.desc: Slams shield creating a localized gravity warp. Forces Taunt on all enemies for 2 turns. If an enemy attacks an ally during this time — damage is retroactively transferred to the Bastion instead.

abilities.name: Entangled Aegis
abilities.desc: Select an ally. For 3 turns — Bastion and ally are quantum entangled. Ally gains 50% of Bastion's current DEF stat. Any negative status effects applied to the ally are automatically mirrored onto the enemy who cast them.

abilities.name: Paradox Engine
abilities.desc: Drives shield deep into the timeline. For 2 turns entire party enters absolute superposition. All damage taken during these 2 turns is recorded — at the end there is a 50% chance damage is entirely deleted, or a 50% chance it converts into an equivalent team-wide heal.

abilities.name: Wave-Particle Duality
abilities.desc: Passive: Toggle Wave/Particle Form for different combat advantages.

abilities.name: Interference Slash
abilities.desc: Wave Form: hits entire row, pushes all back 10% on Turn Meter. Particle Form: high critical damage to single target.

abilities.name: State Shift
abilities.desc: Swaps between Wave and Particle forms without consuming a turn action. Grants a temporary 1-turn barrier upon switching.

abilities.name: Quantum Tunneling
abilities.desc: Phases through the enemy frontline to strike a backline target. Bypasses all Taunts, covers, and defensive shields. Deals pure True Quantum damage.

abilities.name: Phasecollapse Flurry
abilities.desc: Splits into four identical timeline duplicates surrounding the entire enemy party. All duplicates strike simultaneously — heavy Quantum damage to all targets. Phasewalker lands back in original position locked into Particle Form with infinite Critical Hit chance for the next round.

abilities.name: Splintered Realities
abilities.desc: Passive: At 100 Tachyon Stress — next attack triggers Timeline Fracture.

abilities.name: Fracture Chop
abilities.desc: Heavy overhead swing. High physical damage. Generates 20 Tachyon Stress. Applies Decaying Reality — target takes 10% more damage from all sources for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Spatial Tear
abilities.desc: Slams sword horizontally tearing a rift. Pulls all backrow enemies into the frontrow. Moderate Quantum damage. Removes their ability to dodge.

abilities.name: Parallel Strike
abilities.desc: Breaker swings — an echo of their blade from an alternate universe strikes a split-second later. Deals two separate instances of heavy physical damage to a single target.

abilities.name: The Grand Shatter
abilities.desc: Raises blade and slams down with catastrophic force — shattering the current timeline for the enemy team. Immense armor-ignoring damage to all enemies. Forcefully resets ALL enemy skill cooldowns back to maximum duration — locking them out of special abilities for 2 rounds.

abilities.name: Cause & Effect
abilities.desc: Passive: Causality Chains cause attackers to take 50% damage back.

abilities.name: Logic Gavel
abilities.desc: Blunt physical damage to single target. Applies Causality Chain for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Event Horizon Slap
abilities.desc: Slams ground emitting a heavy gravitational pulse. Reduces SPD of all enemies by 20%. Prevents any enemy from gaining extra turns or Turn Meter buffs for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Delayed Reaction
abilities.desc: High physical damage. Inflicts Stasis Lock — any actions taken on the target's next turn have no effect until the turn after next. A one-turn delay on all their actions.

abilities.name: Reversal Of Causality
abilities.desc: Flashes a blinding white grid across the arena. All damage dealt by the enemy team during the previous round is completely undone — restoring the party's health pools. The total amount of undone damage is gathered and slammed back into the enemy team as a massive unblockable Quantum explosion.

abilities.name: Quantum Tunneling
abilities.desc: Passive: Ghost State grants 100% evasion and full armor bypass.

abilities.name: Subatomic Puncture
abilities.desc: Double stab from behind. High physical damage. Generates 1 Tunneling Charge.

abilities.name: Superposition Vanish
abilities.desc: Instantly dissolves into a cloud of quantum probabilities — enters stealth for 2 turns. Cleanses all tracking and DoT debuffs currently affecting them.

abilities.name: Chromatic Slice
abilities.desc: Swift cross-slash dealing Quantum damage. Inflicts Entropic Bleed — every time the infected target takes a turn, they lose 5% current HP and SPD is reduced by 10% (stacks up to 3 times).

abilities.name: Zero-State Execution
abilities.desc: Spends all remaining Tunneling Charges to erase themselves from current reality — reappears directly inside the target's space. Catastrophic True Damage to single target. If it kills the target — instantly regains all Tunneling Charges and re-enters stealth automatically.

abilities.name: Probability Matrix
abilities.desc: Passive: Entropic Variance bar shifts per shot — affects evasion and crit.

abilities.name: Stochastic Burst
abilities.desc: Rapid three-shot volley. Each bullet independently has 50% chance to deal double damage OR 50% chance to apply a random minor debuff. Generates 15% Variance shift.

abilities.name: Vector Tumble
abilities.desc: Quick acrobatic dive — repositions on battlefield. Evasion +30% for 1 turn. Next pistol attack fires an extra bonus bullet.

abilities.name: Quantum Ricochet
abilities.desc: High-velocity tracking round. If it lands — bullet splits into three energy beams that automatically strike the remaining enemies with the lowest current HP.

abilities.name: Corona Of Echoes
abilities.desc: Unloads both pistols in a blinding circle creating a localized storm of temporal copies. Fires 10 high-velocity photon shots distributed randomly across enemy team. Every critical hit landed reduces cooldown of the party's signature abilities by 1 turn.

abilities.name: Uncertainty Principle
abilities.desc: Passive: Damage variance increases with distance. Max potential rises dramatically.

abilities.name: Collapsing Round
abilities.desc: Heavy hyper-velocity rifle shot. High piercing damage. Generates 25% Measurement on target. Pushes enemy back 20% on the Turn Meter.

abilities.name: Quantum Lock-On
abilities.desc: Enters immobile aiming stance. Critical Damage +50%. Measurement generation against selected target is doubled while active.

abilities.name: Collapse Wave
abilities.desc: Fire quantum round. Damage resolves next turn based on active debuffs.

abilities.name: Entangled Bullet
abilities.desc: Fires specialized round at an enemy. If it hits — a second enemy in the same row takes 100% of the damage as an entangled echo.

abilities.name: Quantum Sight
abilities.desc: Observe all trajectories. Next 2 attacks ignore 40% armor. Crit +20%.

abilities.name: The Ultimate Observer
abilities.desc: Fires a single cataclysmic bullet traveling through alternate realities to find the target. Immense armor-ignoring damage to single enemy. If target is below 40% HP — instantly erased from the timeline, bypassing all death-defy skills. If it kills the target — remaining enemies gain Existential Dread, reducing Accuracy and SPD by 30% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: The Wellspring
abilities.desc: Passive: Sprout Nodes heal allies or damage enemies when triggered.

abilities.name: Temporal Bolt
abilities.desc: Spinning missile of pure chronal energy. High Spirit damage. Moves target's turn icon backward 15% on the timeline.

abilities.name: Past-State Recall
abilities.desc: Target an ally. Restores that ally's HP and resource pools to exactly what they were at the start of the previous round. Cleanses all debuffs applied this turn.

abilities.name: Evolutionary Bolt
abilities.desc: High Spirit damage. Places Sprout Node on turn timeline.

abilities.name: Chrono-Loop
abilities.desc: Traps an enemy in a localized time loop for 2 turns. At the start of their turn — they automatically repeat the exact action they took on their previous turn, and any damage they took last round is dealt to them again.

abilities.name: Primal Growth
abilities.desc: Heal self for significant HP. Grant Thick Hide (+25% DEF) for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Time Stop
abilities.desc: Massive reality-freezing expansion wave. ALL enemies completely frozen in time for 1 full round — cannot act, cooldowns do not tick, turn bars locked. Party gains 30% SPD buff and immediate turn priority once time stop ends.

abilities.name: Absolute Coherence
abilities.desc: Passive: At 5 Coherence Layers — attacks deal True Damage splashing all.

abilities.name: Lattice Slice
abilities.desc: Vibrating energy blade strike. Physical + Quantum damage. Generates 1 Coherence Layer.

abilities.name: Vector Flash
abilities.desc: Burst of hard-light particles at an enemy row. High Quantum damage. Applies Vector Distortion — attacks made by those enemies split and deal 30% less damage for 2 turns. Generates 1 Coherence Layer.

abilities.name: Quantum Disruption
abilities.desc: Drives blade into earth sending a ripple of destabilizing energy through the floor. Destroys ALL enemy shields and defensive barriers instantly. High AoE damage.

abilities.name: Matrix Collapse
abilities.desc: Sweeping circular slash cutting through the molecular bonds of the entire arena. Massive armor-piercing physical + Quantum damage to all enemies. Leaves a Coherent Field on the ally side for 3 turns — party Critical Hit Chance +30%, everyone has 15% chance to completely phase through and negate incoming attacks.

abilities.name: Gravitational Inversion
abilities.desc: Passive: G-Force meter center gives 25% passive block bonus.

abilities.name: Event Horizon Smash
abilities.desc: Physical + Umbraxis damage. Shifts meter +15% High-G. Inflicts Crushed — reduces target armor by 20% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Orbital Pull
abilities.desc: Releases sweeping gravitational vortex. Pulls all enemies toward Sovereign's row. Forces Taunt for 2 turns. Shifts meter +25% High-G.

abilities.name: Anti-Gravity Field
abilities.desc: Releases pulse of low-gravity energy around ally party. Cleanses all SPD-reducing debuffs. Grants all allies Weightless for 2 turns — SPD and Evasion +25%. Shifts meter -40% Low-G.

abilities.name: Tidal Collapse
abilities.desc: Drives blade into shield and slams down creating a catastrophic localized singularity. All enemies violently pulled into a single point — massive blunt + gravity damage. Inflicts G-Lock — complete stun for 1 turn and Turn Meter delayed by 30%. Resets G-Force Meter to 0%.

abilities.name: Slingshot Velocity
abilities.desc: Passive: At 5 Vector Momentum stacks — next attack is True Damage.

abilities.name: Slingshot Strike
abilities.desc: Swift double-slash that moves Vector to an adjacent row. Physical damage. Generates 1 Vector Momentum stack.

abilities.name: Warp Dash
abilities.desc: Blinks through an enemy to reappear behind them. Umbraxis damage. Lowers target's Turn Meter by 15% from spatial disorientation. Generates 1 Vector Momentum stack.

abilities.name: Spaghettification
abilities.desc: Horrific flurry of 4 rapid twisting slashes at a single enemy's joints. High physical + gravity damage. Pulls target's turn icon down by 25%.

abilities.name: EVENT HORIZON DANCE
abilities.desc: Infinite Momentum state — strikes hit all adjacent enemies.

abilities.name: The Event Horizon Dance
abilities.desc: Enters over-clocked state moving along a perfect gravitational matrix. For 2 turns — infinite Vector Momentum stacks, movement skills cost no actions, every strike automatically hits all adjacent enemies as space bends around the blades.

abilities.name: Accretion Disk
abilities.desc: Passive: At 100 Accretion — attacks ignore shields and covers.

abilities.name: Dense Cleave
abilities.desc: Brutal downward swing. Massive physical damage to single target. 40% splash damage to entire row. Generates 20 Accretion.

abilities.name: Pull of the Core
abilities.desc: Slams heavy hilt into ground creating a miniature gravity well. Pulls a backline enemy into the frontrow. Inflicts Weighed Down — Evasion -30% for 2 turns. Generates 15 Accretion.

abilities.name: Crushing Void
abilities.desc: Massive horizontal swing targeting enemy frontline. Heavy gravity damage. Applies Fractured Guard — physical DEF -35% for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Black Hole Dropdown
abilities.desc: Leaps into air, focuses all Accretion into greatsword tip, drives it into the center of the enemy team. Catastrophic armor-piercing damage to all enemies. Dispels all positive status buffs. Locks all enemies out of gaining Turn Meter buffs for 2 rounds.

abilities.name: Graviton Matrix
abilities.desc: Passive: G-Anchors detonate on Hyper-Mass Drop for bonus AoE.

abilities.name: Anchor Slam
abilities.desc: Blunt damage to single target. Places a G-Anchor on their location for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Matrix Shift
abilities.desc: Alters the gravity of the battlefield grid. Instantly swaps locations of two enemies or two allies without resetting their turn bars. Generates 20 Warden Energy.

abilities.name: Hyper-Mass Drop
abilities.desc: Swings hammer upward then increases its mass tenfold as it falls. Immense blunt physical damage to single target. If target has a G-Anchor — anchor explodes dealing bonus AoE damage and Stunning target for 1 turn.

abilities.name: The Kinetic Crush
abilities.desc: Lifts hammer pulling all active G-Anchors into a single massive orbital ring above the enemy team — slams them down like meteorites. Devastating blunt + Umbraxis damage to all enemies. Grounds all enemies — prevents flying, dodging, or using teleportation and row-swap skills for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Stable Nodes
abilities.desc: Passive: Near a Lagrange Node — Spatial Cloak and +30% crit.

abilities.name: Zero-G Pierce
abilities.desc: Swift weightless double-stab from behind. High critical damage. Generates 1 Lagrange Node.

abilities.name: Node Blink
abilities.desc: Instantly blinks to any active Lagrange Node on the field. Cleanses all negative status effects. Resets stealth duration. Does not break stealth if already active.

abilities.name: Spacial Tear
abilities.desc: Vicious cross-slash cutting the spatial fabric around the target. Heavy physical damage. Inflicts Bleeding Space — continuous Umbraxis DoT for 3 turns that cannot be cleansed by basic support skills.

abilities.name: Libration Point Execution
abilities.desc: Consumes all active Lagrange Nodes to launch a multi-dimensional execution strike. Strikes primary target once per node consumed — each hit deals massive armor-ignoring True Damage. If it kills the target — instantly regains all skill cooldowns and enters permanent stealth for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Planetary Orbit
abilities.desc: Passive: Orbital Ring builds to 6 bullets before crashing inward.

abilities.name: Kinetic Rotation
abilities.desc: Rapid two-shot burst. Umbraxis damage. Adds 1 bullet to Planetary Orbit ring per shot (max 6).

abilities.name: Gravitational Slide
abilities.desc: Low-gravity slide that switches the Orbitalist's row position. Evasion +40% for 1 turn. Adds 2 bullets to the orbit ring.

abilities.name: Decay Command
abilities.desc: Commands all active Planetary Orbit bullets to crash into a single target. Each bullet deals bonus True Damage and permanently lowers target's DEF by 5% for the rest of the fight.

abilities.name: Meteoric Corona
abilities.desc: Triggers massive gravity expansion — all 6 orbital bullets split into 12 hyper-velocity fragments. Fragments rain down randomly across entire enemy party — massive AoE damage. Every critical hit landed increases party SPD by 5% for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Spatial Compression
abilities.desc: Passive: At 100% Compression — next shot folds space, bypasses everything.

abilities.name: Coordinate Shot
abilities.desc: Precise rifle shot. High piercing damage. Generates 25% Compression data. Pushes enemy back 15% on Turn Meter from spatial shockwave.

abilities.name: Folding Lens
abilities.desc: Enters deep aiming stance. Next attack Critical Damage +50%. Prevents targeted enemy from receiving shields or healing for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Warp Round
abilities.desc: High-density gravity bullet warping through a row of enemies. Moderate damage to all targets hit. Forcefully row-swaps them — scattering their formation.

abilities.name: Apex Singularity Drive
abilities.desc: Fires a hyper-dense projectile creating a localized black hole inside the target's chest. Catastrophic damage to single enemy. If target survives — singularity violently collapses, dealing 50% of the damage to all adjacent enemies and freezing their cooldowns for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Distortion Field
abilities.desc: Passive: Gravity Rifts on timeline damage and debuff enemies who cross them.

abilities.name: Dark Matter Bolt
abilities.desc: Swirling sphere of dense space-time particles. High Spirit damage. Generates 1 Gravity Rift on the turn timeline.

abilities.name: Temporal Dilatation
abilities.desc: Target an ally or enemy row. Ally row: grants Haste (+30% SPD) for 2 turns. Enemy row: inflicts Slow (-30% SPD), skill cooldowns take an extra turn to refresh.

abilities.name: Event Horizon Loop
abilities.desc: Traps an enemy in a localized spatial loop for 2 turns. Any damage that enemy deals to the party is gathered — at the start of their next turn that exact damage pool is slammed back into them as internal damage.

abilities.name: Unmaking Of The Lattice
abilities.desc: Raises staff causing the visual graphics of the screen to fold inward. Opens a massive cataclysmic void rift beneath the entire enemy team. Immense gravity + space-time damage to all. Forcefully reduces all enemy resource and mana bars to 0. Sets all skill cooldowns to maximum. Pins all enemies to the floor for 1 round.

abilities.name: Mass Modulation
abilities.desc: Passive: At 5 Density Layers — attacks are True Damage splashing entire line.

abilities.name: Vector Slice
abilities.desc: Vibrating energy blade strike. Physical + Umbraxis damage. Generates 1 Density Layer.

abilities.name: Cosmic Fracture
abilities.desc: Burst of dense gravity waves at an enemy row. High Umbraxis damage. Applies Mass Distortion — reduces attack power of those enemies by 25% for 2 turns. Generates 1 Density Layer.

abilities.name: Singularity Strike
abilities.desc: Overhead slam creating a localized gravity warp at point of impact. Destroys ALL enemy shields and defensive barriers instantly. High AoE damage to target and adjacent enemies.

abilities.name: Voidstar Collapse
abilities.desc: Massive sweeping circular slash shattering the spatial bonds of the entire arena grid. Massive armor-piercing physical + gravity damage to all enemies. Leaves a Singularity Field on ally side for 3 turns — party Critical Hit Chance +30%, everyone has 15% chance to completely redirect incoming physical attacks back at the attacker.
